tools.name: get_connor_profile
tools.description: Get Connor Gallic's profile: who he is, his role (AI Automation Architect, founder of MeetKai), what he builds, and his social links.

tools.name: list_products
tools.description: List Connor Gallic's products (KaiCalls the AI receptionist, Kai CMO, Build with Kai) with what each does, who it is for, and the URL to use it.

tools.name: list_writing
tools.description: List Connor Gallic's original blog posts on AI automation, voice AI, programmatic SEO, and running products solo. Optional filters: query (matches title/excerpt) and category.

tools.name: get_post
tools.description: Get a single Connor Gallic blog post by slug (title, summary, category, and the URL to read the full post).

tools.name: list_reading_log
tools.description: List Connor Gallic's public AI reading log: Discord research links, Brain summaries, saved AI papers, repos, tools, and build candidates. Optional filters: query, theme, week, latestOnly, and buildOnly.

tools.name: recommend_action
tools.description: Given a person's need or situation, return the best next action and destination URL (hire KaiCalls, join the Kai CMO waitlist, try Build with Kai, read the AI receptionist overview, read the writing, or subscribe). Returns ranked suggestions; the caller decides.

tools.name: get_catalog
tools.description: Get the full machine-readable catalog: profile, products, ventures, open source, writing, actions, and endpoints.

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: list_products, list_writing, get_post, recommend_action · Public sink: get_post.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: list_products, list_writing, get_post, recommend_action · Public sink: get_post

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
